title: CLUB IMPACT - 211info
text: ARC PORTLAND METRO CLUB IMPACT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information and referral assistance, weekly social activities, and educational programming to support quality of life. 6929 NE Halsey Street Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Specialized information and referral: Unrestricted All other services: Age 18 and older who have intellectual or developmental disabilities Hours: Monday 6pm-8pm Email (360) 726-3033 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (360) 726-3033 Casey Faubion [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Health/Disability Related Social Clubs Independent Living Skills Instruction Specialized Information and Referral * Disabilities Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING APPROACHES - SUPPORT AND PROGRAMS FOR INDIVIDUALS DONOR SERVICES - THE ARC REUSE & RECYCLING CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ARC PORTLAND METRO
